_comment: Legami project settings — the single source of truth applied to every Blender scene by the legami_pipeline addon. Edit this file, upload to /shared/Legami/02_pipeline/project_settings.json, and everyone gets the change on next 'Apply Project Settings'. Color names (display_device / view_transform / look) MUST match the displays & views in the active OCIO config; the addon warns instead of crashing if a name is missing.
_addons_note: Blender add-ons to make available when launched through the app. For each, the addon is enabled if installed, else auto-installed from a project-shipped zip in 02_pipeline/blender_extensions/<name>.zip (which syncs to every machine), then enabled. Matched by module leaf name so bundled and 4.2+ extension forms both work. Default if omitted: add_camera_rigs (the layout Dolly/Crane camera rig).
_formats_note: Delivery formats: every shot playblast renders ONCE PER FORMAT through the same camera (…_playblast_16x9.mp4 + …_playblast_9x16.mp4); every format is a review item in the Dailies tab and uploads to SyncSketch. Formats NARROWER than the first NEST inside it: same height/vertical FOV, so the 9x16 (810x1440) is literally the centered slice of the 16x9 (2560x1440) frame. In Blender, 'Preview format' cycles the scene through these (the 16:9 preview draws a dashed box where the 9:16 slice sits). Remove the block for single-format projects.
_playblast_note: Shot playblast (layout/anim): a render of the shot's frame range through the shot camera, pushed to 07_dailies on publish. engine BLENDER_EEVEE_NEXT renders full materials+textures+lighting (matches the shaded viewport). auto_light: shots with NO lights of their own get a camera-parented shadowless key+fill rig (reaches inside closed sets, near-zero render cost) — set false to always render the shot's own lighting. samples (EEVEE, default 16 vs render's 64) and resolution_percentage (50 = half the delivery size, ~4x fewer pixels) keep playblasts FAST — bump them if clips look rough. BLENDER_WORKBENCH is a fast flat/shadeless pass; for it, color=TEXTURE shows the texture maps. resolution/fps used when no 'formats' block is set.
_assembly_note: Shot 'elements' (breakdown): how each element resolves per step. layout/animation link the asset's rig (model fallback); lighting will load the alembic cache + apply looks (next round). camera_step = which shot step publishes the shot's own camera. Omit to use the built-in defaults.
_planning_note: Production plan (Plan tab): deadline drives the capacity-vs-remaining math and schedule health. default_estimates = workdays assumed per step when a task has no estimate of its own; availability = workdays/week per artist when not 5 (part-timers). Estimates and due dates live on the task records, edited from the Plan tab.
_profiling_note: Pre-publish scene profiler (environments): WARN-only, never blocks. Omit a key to skip that check.
